hero.alt: Quickvoice AI-powered order status and returns dashboard showing real-time order tracking, customer analytics, and automated returns processing

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thanks for calling ShopEase Support... I’m your AI assistant, here to help you with order status, deliveries, and returns. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I want to check the status of my order.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Could you please share your order number?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, it’s order number S E - 4 5 8 7 2.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Please give me a moment while I check your order... Alright, I see your order here. Your package is out for delivery and is expected to arrive today by 7 p.m. Would you like me to send you the live tracking link?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Done. I’ve sent the tracking link to your WhatsApp and email. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Actually, I might want to return one item from the order.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: No problem at all. I can help you initiate a return. May I know which item you’d like to return?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Got it. The blue jacket is eligible for return until June thirtieth. Would you like a pickup from your address, or prefer to drop it off at a nearby store?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Sure. I’ve scheduled a pickup for tomorrow between ten a.m. and one p.m. Once the item is picked up, your refund of two thousand four hundred ninety nine rupees will be processed within five to seven business days. You’ll receive confirmation shortly. Is there anything else I can assist you with?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thanks for the help.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thank you for shopping with ShopEase... Have a great day.
